---
title: "Fig S2. LASSO regression path diagram and cross validation curve."
author: "Liang Huang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (LASSO) model parameter index, include path diagram, cross validation curve and area under curve (AUC).
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

# 加载必要的包
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(doParallel)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(pROC)
library(gridExtra)
setwd("E:/博士2023-2025/课题/跨组织转录组-肠道微生物/machine_learning/")
data=read.csv("../mRNA_rpkm_symbol.csv",row.names = 1)
data=data %>%
  filter(rowSums(data >0)>=5)
data=as.data.frame(t(data))

genes_cluster=read.csv("./cluster_genes_wide.csv",row.names = 1)
genes_cluster$tissue="colon"
genes_cluster$tissue[genes_cluster$cluster==5]="liver"
genes_cluster$tissue[genes_cluster$cluster==4]="jejunum"
genes_cluster$tissue[genes_cluster$cluster==6]="heart"
genes_cluster$tissue[genes_cluster$cluster==3]="lung"
genes_cluster$tissue[genes_cluster$cluster==1]="kidney"

data=data[,colnames(data)%in%genes_cluster$gene]

group=read.csv("../group.csv")
names(group)[1]="sample_id"
names(group)[2]="treatment"
rownames(group)=group[,1]
group$mouse_id=rep(c(1:9),6)

df=cbind(group,data)
df$treatment[df$treatment%in%c("FMT","SPF")]="NGF"
set.seed(123)

tissues <- c("colon","liver","jejunum","heart","lung","kidney")

comparison <- c("GF", "NGF")

lasso_results <- list()

preprocess_data <- function(x) {
  x_var <- apply(x, 2, var)
  x <- x[, x_var > 0, drop = FALSE]
  
  x <- scale(x)
  
  return(x)
}

for (tissue_name in tissues) {
  cat("Analyzing tissue:", tissue_name, "\n")
  
  tissue_data <- df %>% 
    filter(treatment %in% comparison) %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, tissue, mouse_id))
  tissue_data=tissue_data[,colnames(tissue_data) %in% 
                            c("treatment",genes_cluster$gene[genes_cluster$tissue==tissue_name]) ]
  
  if (nrow(tissue_data) < 6) {
    cat("Skipping", tissue_name, "due to insufficient samples (n =", nrow(tissue_data), ")\n")
    next
  }
  
  y <- ifelse(tissue_data$treatment == comparison[1], 0, 1)
  x <- tissue_data %>% select(-treatment)
  
  if (length(unique(y)) < 2) {
    cat("Skipping", tissue_name, "due to only one class in response variable\n")
    next
  }
  
  class_counts <- table(y)
  if (any(class_counts < 3)) {
    cat("Skipping", tissue_name, "due to insufficient samples in one class\n")
    next
  }
  
  x_processed <- preprocess_data(x)
  
  if (ncol(x_processed) == 0) {
    cat("Skipping", tissue_name, "due to no features after preprocessing\n")
    next
  }
  
  x_matrix <- as.matrix(x_processed)
    tryCatch({
    cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
      x = x_matrix,
      y = y,
      family = "binomial",
      alpha = 1,
      nfolds = min(5, nrow(x_matrix)),
      type.measure = "class", 
      parallel = FALSE
    )
    
    best_lambda <- cv_fit$lambda.min
    
    best_model <- glmnet(
      x = x_matrix,
      y = y,
      family = "binomial",
      alpha = 1,
      lambda = best_lambda
    )
    
    coefficients <- as.matrix(coef(best_model))
    nonzero_indices <- which(coefficients != 0)
    nonzero_coef <- coefficients[nonzero_indices, , drop = FALSE]
    
    if (length(nonzero_indices) > 0 && rownames(nonzero_coef)[1] == "(Intercept)") {
      nonzero_coef <- nonzero_coef[-1, , drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    predictions <- predict(best_model, newx = x_matrix, type = "response")
    predicted_classes <- ifelse(predictions > 0.5, 1, 0)
    
    accuracy <- mean(predicted_classes == y)
    
    auc_value <- tryCatch({
      roc_obj <- roc(y, as.numeric(predictions))
      auc(roc_obj)
    }, error = function(e) {
      NA
    })
    
    lasso_results[[tissue_name]] <- list(
      model = best_model,
      cv_model = cv_fit,
      best_lambda = best_lambda,
      selected_genes = if (nrow(nonzero_coef) > 0) rownames(nonzero_coef) else character(0),
      coefficients = if (nrow(nonzero_coef) > 0) nonzero_coef[, 1] else numeric(0),
      performance = list(
        Accuracy = accuracy,
        AUC = auc_value
      ),
      predictions = predictions,
      true_labels = y
    )
    
    if (!is.na(auc_value)) {
      cat("Selected", length(lasso_results[[tissue_name]]$selected_genes), 
          "genes for", tissue_name, ", AUC =", round(auc_value, 3), "\n\n")
    } else {
      cat("Selected", length(lasso_results[[tissue_name]]$selected_genes), 
          "genes for", tissue_name, ", Accuracy =", round(accuracy, 3), "\n\n")
    }
    
    tissue_dir <- paste0("./LASSO/", tissue_name)
    if (!dir.exists(tissue_dir)) {
      dir.create(tissue_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    
    pdf(file.path(tissue_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_coefficient_path.pdf")), 
        width = 10/2.53, height = 10/2.53)
    par(mar = c(5, 4, 4, 2) + 0.1)  
    plot(cv_fit$glmnet.fit, xvar = "lambda", main = "",xlab="")
    abline(v = -log(best_lambda), lty = 2, col = "red")
    dev.off()
    
    pdf(file.path(tissue_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_cv_error.pdf")), 
        width = 10/2.53, height = 10/2.53)
    plot(cv_fit, main = "",xlab="")
    dev.off()
    
    if (!is.na(auc_value)) {
      roc_data <- roc(y, as.numeric(predictions))
      
      pdf(file.path(tissue_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_roc_curve.pdf")), 
          width = 10/2.53, height = 10/2.53)
      plot(roc_data, main = "",col="red")
      text(0.5, 0.3, paste("AUC =", round(auc_value, 3)), adj = c(0,1))
      dev.off()
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error in LASSO for", tissue_name, ":", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

results_summary <- data.frame()

for (tissue_name in names(lasso_results)) {
  tissue_result <- lasso_results[[tissue_name]]
  
  if (length(tissue_result$selected_genes) > 0) {
    tissue_df <- data.frame(
      Tissue = tissue_name,
      Gene = tissue_result$selected_genes,
      Coefficient = tissue_result$coefficients,
      AbsoluteEffect = abs(tissue_result$coefficients),
      Lambda = tissue_result$best_lambda,
      AUC = ifelse(!is.na(tissue_result$performance$AUC), 
                   tissue_result$performance$AUC, NA),
      Accuracy = tissue_result$performance$Accuracy,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    tissue_df <- tissue_df %>% arrange(desc(AbsoluteEffect))
    
    results_summary <- rbind(results_summary, tissue_df)
  }
}

setwd("./LASSO/")
if (nrow(results_summary) > 0) {
  cat("LASSO analysis results:\n")
  cat("Total", nrow(results_summary), "\n")
  
  tissue_stats <- results_summary %>%
    group_by(Tissue) %>%
    summarise(
      Num_Genes = n(),
      Mean_AbsEffect = mean(AbsoluteEffect),
      Max_AbsEffect = max(AbsoluteEffect),
      AUC = first(AUC),
      Accuracy = first(Accuracy)
    )
  
  print(tissue_stats)
  
  write.csv(results_summary, "lasso_selected_genes_by_tissue.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  p1 <- ggplot(tissue_stats, aes(x = reorder(Tissue, Num_Genes), y = Num_Genes)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "Number of Selected Genes by Tissue",
         x = "", y = "gene count") +
    theme_minimal()+
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NULL),
          text = element_text(size = 8),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 8))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0.1))
  
  print(p1)
  ggsave("../gene_count_by_tissue.pdf", p1, width = 6/2.53, height = 5/2.53)
  
  performance_metrics <- tissue_stats %>%
    select(Tissue, AUC, Accuracy) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(AUC, Accuracy), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")
  
  p2 <- ggplot(performance_metrics, aes(x = Tissue, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_discrete(palette = c("grey","#46aae0"))+
    labs(title = "Model Performance by Tissue",
         x = "Tissue", y = "Performance") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(fill = NULL),
      text = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 8))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0.1))
  
  print(p2)
  ggsave("../performance_by_tissue.pdf", p2, width = 10/2.53, height = 6/2.53)
  
} else {
  cat("No results.\n")
}
```
